name: @sittir/typescript
description: Typed TypeScript IR builder — node kinds from tree-sitter-typescript grammar

scripts.generate: rm -f src/factories.ts src/from.ts src/ir.ts src/utils.ts src/types.ts src/consts.ts src/index.ts templates.yaml tests/nodes.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types ../codegen/src/cli.ts --grammar typescript --all --output src/
scripts.regenerate: pnpm generate && pnpm build && pnpm test

//peer: Optional peer @sittir/typescript-native is added by spec 012 T037 once the native package is published. Listing it here pre-publish causes pnpm install to 404 even with peerDependenciesMeta.optional=true because pnpm still probes the registry.
